description: Capability for the main window. F15 (desktop-ipc) adds shell:allow-execute, scoped to ONLY the core-sidecar binary (not a general shell-exec grant) -- the two commands in commands.rs (ping, transcribe) are the sole callers. Later features (F17/F18/F21) add exactly the permission their own new command needs, reviewed by .claude/agents/tauri-capability-reviewer.md (ACCEPTANCE G3).
